tagline: We make pool ownership easy — so you can focus on what matters

hero.headline: 50 Years Keeping Southwest Florida Swimming
hero.subheadline: Since 1974, Pool Doctor has been the family-owned team Cape Coral and Naples trust for crystal-clear pools. Background-checked technicians, an 8-step cleaning process, and honest pricing — so you never worry about your pool again.
checkmarks: Dedicated technician assigned to your pool
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full equipment overhauls, our certified technicians handle every aspect of pool ownership so you don't have to.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Our thorough 8-step maintenance process keeps your pool sparkling, chemically balanced, and swim-ready every single week — rain or shine.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, motors, filters, heaters — we diagnose the real problem fast and back every new installation with full manufacturer warranties.

cards.title: Pool Automation Systems
cards.description: Control your pool lights, temperature, and equipment from your phone. We install and configure modern automation so pool care runs on autopilot.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Inspections
cards.description: Unexplained water loss? Our professional detection pinpoints leaks quickly, saving you from costly structural damage down the road.

cards.title: Salt Systems & Filter Upgrades
cards.description: Upgrade to salt chlorination for softer, more natural water and fewer chemicals — plus high-performance filters that cut your maintenance in half.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: HOAs, resorts, and businesses trust us for code-compliant commercial pool maintenance, repairs, and equipment management year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Pool Care Made Simple in 3 Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your pool, assess its condition, and recommend exactly what it needs — no pressure, no upsells.

steps.title: Meet Your Dedicated Technician
steps.description: We assign one background-checked, certified tech to your pool. They learn your system inside and out so nothing gets missed.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Sit back while we handle the chemistry, cleaning, and equipment checks. You get a sparkling pool and proactive updates — every single week.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1974
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Expertise You Can Count On
about.description: Pool Doctor started as a small retail shop in 1974 and grew into Southwest Florida's most trusted full-service pool company. For over 50 years, we've built our reputation one pool at a time — with honest diagnostics, fair pricing, and technicians who treat your pool like their own. Every team member is background-checked, certified through our Pool Vision training program, and committed to the same standard: do the job right the first time.

features.title: Background-Checked & Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check and completes our Pool Vision training program before ever servicing your pool.

features.title: Proprietary 8-Step Process
features.description: Our proven 8-step maintenance checklist ensures nothing gets skipped — from chemistry to equipment checks — every single visit.

features.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
features.description: We carry full general liability and workers' compensation insurance, plus contractor license CPC#057088, for your complete protection.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, Zero Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Tell us about yours and we'll send a clear, honest quote — typically within 24 hours. No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Promise
guarantee.description: If you're ever unhappy with a service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've kept this promise for over 50 years because our reputation means everything. That's the Pool Doctor difference.

faqs.question: How does your 8-step cleaning process work?
faqs.answer: Every visit, your dedicated technician follows our proven 8-step process: skim the surface, brush walls and tile, vacuum the floor, empty skimmer and pump baskets, test and balance water chemistry, inspect equipment, clean the filter as needed, and log a detailed service report. Nothing gets skipped.

faqs.question: Do I get the same technician each week?
faqs.answer: Yes. We assign a dedicated, background-checked technician to your pool. They learn your system's quirks, track its history, and build a relationship with you so issues are caught early and communication is always clear.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Southwest Florida?
faqs.answer: We serve 19 cities including Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Naples, Bonita Springs, Estero, Lehigh Acres, North Fort Myers, Pine Island, Punta Gorda, Sanibel, and surrounding communities across the Fort Myers and Naples region.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool Doctor holds contractor license CPC#057088, carries full general liability and workers' compensation insurance, and every technician passes a thorough background check before joining our team.

faqs.question: Do you offer equipment warranties on new installations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every piece of equipment we install comes with the full manufacturer warranty, and we handle all warranty claims on your behalf. You'll never be stuck dealing with a manufacturer directly.

testimonials.name: Maria Oliva
testimonials.text: My pool tech Elijah is great! He is friendly, trustworthy and leaves my pool looking shiny!

testimonials.name: Christine Kochte
testimonials.text: He was professional, thorough, and incredibly easy to work with. He went above and beyond to make sure everything was done right.

testimonials.name: Rick Blaquiere
testimonials.text: Pool Doctor has been my go-to pool place for 13 years. Ashley is always welcoming and professional.

footer.service_area: Proudly serving Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Naples, Bonita Springs, Estero, Lehigh Acres, North Fort Myers, Pine Island, Punta Gorda, Sanibel, and 19 cities across Southwest Florida.
